历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for science/physics category were approximately 2203, 2173, 1484, 2778, and 4305 respectively. After a significant forward shift to 1484 in 2023, the ranking retreated to 2778 in 2024 and further shifted backward to 4305 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2821 positions over the past two years; the 2025 ranking of 4305 serves as the baseline. The university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Shanxi Province: 133 in 2021, 133 in 2022, 128 in 2023, 118 in 2024, and 134 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 138, a slight expansion of about 3% compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 15th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (stable in the 13–17 range in recent years), belonging to the top-tier national universities; the 2023 reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (teacher ethics incident), but no negative signals for Southeast University appeared in the 2026 reputation document; Douyin popularity ranking 31st (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, reflecting increased attention for applications; no obvious enrollment gaps recorded; 18 disciplines rated A- or above in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, including Architecture A+, Civil Engineering A+, Transportation Engineering A+, Biomedical Engineering A+, Electronic Science and Technology A+, etc., with extremely strong engineering strength, strongly attracting science candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, Electrical Engineering, and other advantageous major categories of Southeast University are all highly recommended or recommended in 2026, with consistently high social popularity; the number of physics category candidates in Shanxi Province in 2026 is approximately 167,400, a decrease of about 3.4% compared to 2025, which is conducive to a forward shift in rankings. Southeast University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu (not within the province), with an enrollment share of about 4.7% in Shanxi Province (2025), making it an inter-provincial enrollment; the university's enrollment share in Jiangsu Province is about 21.7%, and out-of-province candidates need to consider regional preferences, with Nanjing as an eastern developed city having some appeal to Shanxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4305, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (about 3%), the decrease in Shanxi physics category candidates by about 3.4%, the university's top-tier level and advantageous disciplines continuing to attract high-scoring candidates, and the relatively hot Douyin popularity reflecting increased attention, and taking into account the forward-shifting effect of the decrease in total candidates, after moderate correction, the predicted lowest ranking is approximately 4332, with a range of 3838–4826.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 15th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the top-tier national universities; the 2023 reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (teacher ethics incident), but no negative signals for Southeast University appeared in the 2026 reputation document; Douyin popularity ranking 31st (relatively hot), overall attention is high; Law A-, Management Science and Engineering A- are related to the Liberal Arts Experimental Class (Digital Economy and Intelligent Management); Political Science and Public Administration does not have a separate discipline evaluation, but the university's overall liberal arts strength provides support.

专业热度与地域.text: Law major has high social popularity (recommended), economics and management majors are divided and wait-and-see; in 2026, the number of history category examinees in Shanxi Province is approximately 63,100, a significant decrease of about 25.6% compared to 2025, the sharp decline in total examinees is conducive to a forward shift in rankings; Southeast University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, with only 9 enrollment places in the history category in Shanxi Province, the enrollment scale is extremely small, and ranking fluctuations are greatly affected by the application behavior of individual high-scoring examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion

Considering that the sharp decline in total examinees has a forward-shifting effect on rankings, after moderate correction, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 472, with a range of 418–526.
